trans-unit.source: Could not load item details. Please try again later.
Could not load search results. Please try again later.
Could not load filter definitions. Please try again later.
Password must be at least 8 characters
Password must include a lowercase letter
Password must include an uppercase letter
English (US) or English (GB) name is required.
Class ID and subclass ID are required together.
Unable to compare item with Blizzard API.
Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again.
Compare the local recipe data with the current Blizzard API response.
Remove this recipe override and inherit base recipe data again.
Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences.
No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited.
No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited.
Unable to compare recipe with Blizzard API.
Search effective recipe rows and manage admin overrides that survive Blizzard sync.
No recipes match the current filters.
Sign in or create an account to unlock protected auction tools.
Enter the confirmation code sent to your email.
If an account exists for this email, a password reset code has been sent.
Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
Unable to complete the request. Please try again.
Could not load this item. Try again from the market browser.
Average quantity per hour as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.
Listed quantity per hour over 14 days as bars; buyout spread and average as lines.
Average market unit price by day and hour.
No current listings for this item.
Profit hidden until all reagents have prices.
Daily profit and ROI for selected recipe. Missing points mean incomplete pricing.
Average profit by day and hour for selected recipe.
Choose a realm to begin browsing its auction house.
Search by realm name, slug, or region
Could not load realm list. Please try again later.
Delete this recipe override? Base recipe data will be inherited again.
Search items by name or ID
Start an asynchronous sync of professions, skill tiers, recipes, and reagents.
A profession sync is already running.
Unable to start the profession sync.
You can continue browsing recipes while it finishes.
The profession sync could not be completed.
Unable to monitor the admin job. You can try starting it again.
Crafting rules are unavailable; ranking is heuristic.
Heuristic best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Crafting rules are unavailable.
Configure your characters’ crafting skill trees.
Add the characters whose profession builds you want to compare.
Choose a profession and record its ranks. Changes are saved per character.
Add a character to configure a profession profile.
No imported tree is available for this profession yet. Importing is not available from this page.
Enter a region, realm, and character name.
Unable to add this character. Check the details and try again.
Unable to save your skill-tree profile. Your edits are still here.
Unable to load this profession profile.
Look up the character's professions and known recipes before adding it to your profile.
Use this only when Blizzard's profile API is unavailable. Profession and recipe data will not be imported.
Look up the character with Blizzard first.
Character profession data loaded. Review it, then add the character.
Blizzard is unavailable, so the last saved profession preview is shown.
Unable to load professions from Blizzard. Check the realm slug and character name, then try again.
Select your SavedVariables folder. The browser finds AuctionHelper.lua and AuctionHelper_Professions.lua, then processes only those matching files on this device.
Local processing and server validation only report available data. They do not import or replace shared talent-tree definitions.
Choose a folder containing AuctionHelper_Professions.lua first.
Unable to process these SavedVariables files locally. Check the region and choose a valid AuctionHelper_Professions.lua file, then try again.
One or more item-producing recipes do not include a crafted item ID.
One or more quality recipes do not include crafting difficulty or skill data.
The saved export does not contain a supported profession talent scope.
The saved profession talent export could not be decoded safely.
Some addon data could not be associated safely and was omitted.
Unable to submit the normalized profession data. The selected files remain available to retry.
The local API could not be reached. Start the backend, then try again.
Submit only the normalized character, profession, recipe, crafted-item, reagent, and crafting-skill fields shown in this summary. No Lua source is included.
Validated {$INTERPOLATION} character(s), {$INTERPOLATION_1} profession(s), and {$INTERPOLATION_2} recipe(s). No raw Lua was sent.
No recipes match the current search.
Search by recipe name, recipe ID, or crafted item ID
Raw Lua never leaves this device. Other files in the folder are ignored without being read, and only normalized JSON is sent after you review and submit it.
SavedVariables does not contain a reliable region. Enter it so identical character names on different regions stay separate.
Normalized profession data was accepted by the server.
Choose the SavedVariables directory itself. Only the two required filenames are selected.
Choose the two files individually instead.
{$INTERPOLATION} other file(s) ignored and will not be read.
Choose only one copy of each required SavedVariables file.
Choose SavedVariables files smaller than 128 MiB in total.
